channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet

item.title: Same resident parked illegally 9th report - ignored by Council, 29th March
item.description:
Same resident parked illegally at Pynfolds Estate, about 4 to 5 nights/ morning a week. Repeatedly reported to Council. No action. Parked there since early hours. 10:30. No enforcement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

The pothole has been there for many weeks and is extremely dangerous

item.title: Dumped beer cans, bottles, 29th March
item.description:
The lake area again luads bottles etc Also there's a dumped bike by the stairs and on the concrete area(viewing area) loads if beer cans which have been there 10 days so far. The lorry that drives in and empties bibs I think are now pickers too? Seems they pick by the bins but not rest if Butt's wood! Also towards exit that leads to gallions reach health center, more cans on grass, how can they miss tgem? As right by rubbish bins that they need empty? Also, pathway leading towards gallons reach health center exit from lake area, cobrantlt has broken glass from beer bottles which ive tried to clear often myself, but the smaller bits if glass realy bad and gets into animals, our dogs paws. Last week and old lady with a walking frame and her dog had to try hobble onto grass area and uphill as to avoid walking her dog on the pathway. I helped her as was muddy and wet but she said too much glass and couldn't walk her dog that way!! I got the big pieces and bined them but lots if small shards.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Butts Wood Path, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Milton Grove, Hackney, London
